Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Description: Reads your Doman Mahjong hand and either suggests the best discard or plays the match for you.
Changelog: v0.1.2.2: Fix EmjL (NA/EU) tile reading. The EmjL tileTextureBase was off by 2 (76003 instead of 76001), so on NA/EU every tile decoded two ranks too low and 1m/2m tiles were dropped entirely, producing wrong discard suggestions, missing highlights, and tracker desync after a round or two. JP (Emj) was unaffected. The decoder now self-calibrates: if a client patch shifts tile texture IDs again, it detects the dropped tiles, recovers the correct base automatically (both reading and click targeting), and logs a warning instead of silently mis-reading every tile. Added regression tests that decode real captured NA/EU hands through the layout profile so a wrong per-variant base is caught in CI.
